title: ODS-E Failure Taxonomy
description: Failure and root cause classification record from the ERP/EAM failure coding system, including historical repair statistics

failure_code.description: Failure code identifier from the ERP failure taxonomy

failure_description.description: Human-readable description of the failure mode

cause_code.description: Root cause code associated with this failure

cause_description.description: Human-readable description of the root cause

typical_mttr_hours.description: Typical mean time to repair in hours for this failure mode

typical_cost.description: Typical repair cost for this failure mode
